entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: The legume crop being studied for resistance to Ascochyta blight

entities.name: ASCOCHYTA BLIGHT
entities.description: A major biotic stress that limits chickpea production worldwide

entities.name: ASCOCHYTA BLIGHT RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of chickpea genotypes to resist Ascochyta blight infection

entities.name: TRANSCRIPTOME SEQUENCING
entities.description: A sequencing approach used to identify differentially expressed genes in response to stress

entities.name: SMALL RNA SEQUENCING
entities.description: A sequencing approach used to identify and analyze miRNAs

entities.name: DEGRADOME SEQUENCING
entities.description: A sequencing approach used to predict targets for miRNAs

entities.name: DIFFERENTIALLY EXPRESSED GENES
entities.description: Genes that show significant changes in expression levels between resistant and susceptible genotypes or conditions

entities.name: NBS-LRR
entities.description: Disease resistance genes identified among the differentially expressed genes

entities.name: PATHOGENESIS-RELATED PROTEINS
entities.description: Proteins involved in the plant's defense response to pathogens

entities.name: SECONDARY METABOLITE SYNTHESIS GENES
entities.description: Genes involved in the production of secondary metabolites for defense

entities.name: MIRNAS
entities.description: Small RNA molecules that regulate gene expression post-transcriptionally

entities.name: MIRNA-MRNA INTERACTION PAIRS
entities.description: Pairs of miRNAs and their target mRNAs showing contrasting expression in resistant and susceptible genotypes

entities.name: CELL WALL BIOSYNTHESIS
entities.description: The biological process of creating cell walls, identified as related to differentially expressed genes

entities.name: INTROGRESSION LINE
entities.description: A breeding line used to study the transfer of specific traits

entities.name: REGULATORY NETWORK COMPONENTS
entities.description: Components that control gene expression in response to stress
